M0840_ECR_WOUND (M0840) Wound Infection Emergent Care Reason: wound infection, deteriorating wound status, new lesion/ ulcer. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0855_INPAT_FAC (M0855) Inpatient Facility Where Admitted Inpatient facility to which the patient has been admitted. 01 = Hospital
02 = Rehabilitation facility
03 = Nursing home
04 = Hospice
NA = NA - No inpatient facility admission CHAR 2 x x
M0870_DSCHG_DISP (M0870) Discharge
